# External Sample Logs

These PostgreSQL log fixtures were downloaded from the public pgBadger repository
for parser compatibility testing.

Source repository:

- https://github.com/darold/pgbadger

Downloaded files:

- `pgbadger_stmt_type.log`
  - Source path: `t/fixtures/stmt_type.log`
- `pgbadger_multiline_param.log`
  - Source path: `t/fixtures/multiline_param.log`

pgBadger is distributed under the PostgreSQL License. These files are used here
only as compatibility fixtures for PostgreSQL stderr-style log parsing.
